long_description:
Dark fibre flap | LON03 <---> LON04. 
Raising this INC to track progress.


https://github.ibm.com/IaaS-NRE/nreincidents/issues/19927
close_notes: Dark fibre flapped multiple times and is stable now. Vendor was contacted for RFO.
